items.title_en: NetJets' first fatal crash kills influential Texas VC founder
items.title_zh: NetJets 的第一次致命事故导致颇具影响力的德克萨斯州风险投资创始人丧生
items.desc_en: NetJets is not speculating on what caused one of its planes to crash onto a highway in Laredo, Texas late Tuesday, killing a prominent tech entrepreneur.
items.desc_zh: NetJets 并未推测其一架飞机周二晚间坠毁在德克萨斯州拉雷多的高速公路上，导致一名著名科技企业家丧生的原因。

items.title_en: This nuclear stock will benefit from AI datacenter buildout and soaring energy demand, Roth Capital says

items.desc_en: Stock in Nano Nuclear Energy should appreciate as it nears commercialization of its reactor plans while energy demand is surging, Roth Capital said.
items.desc_zh: 罗斯资本表示，随着能源需求激增，纳米核能的反应堆计划即将商业化，其股票应该会升值。

items.title_en: Here are the most overbought and oversold names after a volatile week
items.title_zh: 以下是经历了动荡的一周后超买和超卖最多的股票

items.desc_zh: 这个人口稀少的州以其世界一流的赌场和干燥的气候而闻名，一直是招聘热点。

items.title_en: Brent oil dips below $80 as postponed U.S.-Iran talks temper optimism over ceasefire progress
items.title_zh: 由于推迟的美伊谈判削弱了对停火进展的乐观情绪，布伦特原油跌破80美元
items.desc_en: With immediate supply fears fading and tanker traffic returning to the Strait of Hormuz, traders are turning their attention back to oil demand and OPEC's outlook for the market.
items.desc_zh: 随着当前供应担忧的消退以及油轮运输返回霍尔木兹海峡，交易商将注意力重新转向石油需求和欧佩克对市场的前景。

items.title_en: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
items.title_zh: 内存危机达到如此极端“连苹果也不能安全”
items.desc_en: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
items.desc_zh: 苹果似乎准备采取罕见的涨价举措，以应对首席执行官蒂姆·库克所说的“不可持续”的内存短缺问题。

items.title_en: Global stock markets mixed as investors assess durability of U.S.-Iran peace deal
items.title_zh: 全球股市涨跌互现，投资者评估美伊和平协议的持久性
items.desc_en: U.S. Vice President JD Vance on Thursday defended Trump's interim agreement with Iran, saying any economic relief for Tehran would depend on the country complying with the terms of the deal.
items.desc_zh: 美国副总统万斯周四为特朗普与伊朗达成的临时协议进行了辩护，称对德黑兰的任何经济救济将取决于该国遵守协议条款。

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.

items.title_en: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback

items.desc_zh: 据该公司称，到2025年，上海迪士尼乐园累计游客量将突破1亿人次。这是迪士尼历史上相对较新但重要的立足点。

items.title_en: Why Iran believes deal with US leaves it stronger than before
items.title_zh: 为什么伊朗认为与美国的协议使其比以前更强大
items.desc_en: Iran has come out of the war's first chapter stronger than many expected, but its next challenge may be harder, the BBC Persian Service's Amir Azimi writes.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司波斯语组的阿米尔·阿齐米写道，伊朗在战争的第一章中表现得比许多人预期的更加强大，但它的下一个挑战可能会更加艰巨。

items.title_en: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
items.title_zh: 欧佩克主席驳斥了国际能源署供应过剩的预测，因为“关键”霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
items.desc_en: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.
items.desc_zh: 国际能源署周三表示，持久解决冲突可能会推动供应量激增，并引发明年的重大石油供应过剩。

items.title_en: Jury fails to reach verdict in Norwegian 'hitman' trial
items.title_zh: 挪威“杀手”审判陪审团未能达成裁决
items.desc_en: Johannes Natland, 19, was remanded in custody and will now face a retrial.
items.desc_zh: 19 岁的约翰内斯·纳特兰 (Johannes Natland) 被还押候审，现在将面临重审。

items.title_en: GTA 6 pre-order date and cover art revealed by Rockstar
items.title_zh: Rockstar 公布《GTA 6》预购日期和封面艺术
items.desc_en: The developer has said pre-sales of the hugely anticipated game will begin on 25 June.
items.desc_zh: 开发商表示，这款备受期待的游戏将于 6 月 25 日开始预售。

items.title_en: Hegseth says some Nato allies will fail as he announces US review of Europe forces
items.title_zh: 赫格斯称，当他宣布美国对欧洲军队进行审查时，一些北约盟友将会失败
items.desc_en: The US defence secretary's move follows a US decision to scale back its commitments to a high readiness force within the alliance.
items.desc_zh: 在美国国防部长采取这一举措之前，美国决定缩减对联盟内高度戒备部队的承诺。

items.desc_zh: 加泰罗尼亚当局证实，这名 63 岁的老人周三在帕劳德诺格拉地区死亡。

items.title_en: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.title_zh: 莫斯科遭遇俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来最大规模的乌克兰袭击
items.desc_en: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.desc_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title_en: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
items.title_zh: 涉嫌团伙头目在机场鲜花花束伏击中被枪杀
items.desc_en: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.
items.desc_zh: 枪手在瓜亚基尔机场外等待受害者时，将武器藏在鲜花和毛绒玩具后面。

items.title_en: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.desc_en: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.desc_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题

items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。
